hyperedges.label: Hardcoded NB-218 Panel Routing Pattern
hyperedges.description: All three UI areas (board card clicks, backlog item clicks, overview 'Add task') funnel through onOpenPanel to open TaskPanel, but all are hardcoded to show NB-218 data regardless of actual item context

hyperedges.label: Silent Item Discard in Create Flow
hyperedges.description: Both CreateStoryPanel 'Create' action and Backlog inline create fail to persist new items into blSprints/blBacklog state — items are silently discarded without feedback

hyperedges.label: Board Duplicate Story Groups Overlap
hyperedges.description: Static STORY_GROUPS and active sprint groups are rendered simultaneously in BoardTab, causing stories to appear duplicated (e.g. 'Auth & Sessions' in both sections)
